  • weekly picks (Mar 1 week 2026)

  • A WordCloud of 2026 Mar 1st week collection

    ===This week’s pick===

    • Score : 21114

    2603.05025v1 Topological Surface Charge Detection via Active Capacitive Compensation: A Pathway to the 4D Quantum Hall Effect (arXiv)

    • Score : 20291

    2603.02397v1 Graphene-capped bismuthene on SiC as a platform for correlated quantum spin Hall edge states (arXiv)

    • Score : 18395

    2603.04023v1 Probing pure spin-rotation quantum geometry in persistent spin textures via nonlinear transport (arXiv)

    • Score : 17330

    2603.05164v1 Machine Learning the Strong Disorder Renormalization Group Method for Disordered Quantum Spin Chains (arXiv)

    • Score : 16030

    2603.03599v1 Symmetry selection rules for the intrinsic nonlinear thermal Hall effect in altermagnets: Role of quantum metric and $C_{2}$ rotational symmetry (arXiv)

    • Score : 15936

    2602.23600v1 Second-quantized approach to the study of Halperin state in fractional quantum Hall effect (arXiv)

    Unfold/Fold

    03/07

    1. s41467-026-70252-2 Ballistic transport in nanodevices based on single-crystalline Cu thin films (Nature Communications)
